name: Divination
tagline: See the unseen, sense danger, and glimpse the future.

baseAbility.name: Divine / Sense
baseAbility.description: Divine: 10-minute ritual (or 1 SP for a standard action), full-round action to sustain via concentration; detects the strength and location of magical auras within medium range (blocked by thick stone/metal/wood). Sense: standard action, grants yourself a paranormal sense for 1 hr/CL (you start with Read Magic, letting you decipher magical writing). You gain one bonus (divine) and one bonus (sense) talent when you first take this sphere, plus an extra (divine) option for each other sphere you possess.

talents.name: Divine Shapechanger
talents.description: Divine reveals shapechangers and creatures currently under a shapeshift-like effect.

talents.name: Divine Undead
talents.description: Divine reveals the presence and general power of undead creatures.

talents.name: Divine Bleeding
talents.description: Divine locates creatures that are bleeding or below half HP.

talents.name: Divine Mana Capacity
talents.description: Divine reveals a chosen creature's current and maximum spell points each round.

talents.name: Ultravision
talents.description: Grants a free-action Perception check each round with a circumstance bonus equal to your caster level.

talents.name: Read Omens
talents.description: Ask a yes/no/unclear question about the near future or best course of action, with accuracy improving as your caster level rises.

talents.name: Detect Spellcaster
talents.description: Grants a passive sense that pings you whenever a nearby creature casts a magical effect.

talents.name: True Seeing
talents.description: Grants a sense that pierces illusions, polymorph, and invisibility for its duration.

talents.name: Scrying
talents.description: Remotely view a known location or creature for a limited time, similar to the scrying spell.
